parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{
  json: {
    success: true,
    run_id: item.run_id,
    stage: item.stage,
    job_id: item.job_id || null,
    candidate_id: item.candidate_id || null,
    pipeline_decision: item.pipeline_decision || null,
    candidate_score: item.candidate_score ?? null,
    publish_results: item.publish_results || null,
    job_opening: item.job_opening || null,
    storage: item.storage || null,
    candidate_record: item.candidate_record || null,
    assessment_evaluation: item.assessment_evaluation || null,
    assessment_passed: item.assessment_passed ?? null,
    interview: item.interview || null,
    feedback_summary: item.feedback_summary || null,
    offer: item.offer || null,
    onboarding_plan: item.onboarding_plan || null,
    email_sent: Boolean(item.email_sent || item.email_outbound?.to),
    telegram_sent: Boolean(item.telegram_sent || item.telegram_delivery?.status === 'sent'),
    completed_at: new Date().toISOString()
  }
}];

parameters.content:
## HR Recruitment Agent

**One stage runs per execution.** Set `stage` in the webhook body or edit **Set: Sample Payload** for manual tests.

| stage | test file |
|-------|-----------|
| create_job | docs/hr-recruitment-samples/create-job.json |
| process_application | docs/hr-recruitment-agent-sample-request.json |
| evaluate_assessment | docs/hr-recruitment-samples/evaluate-assessment.json |
| schedule_interview | docs/hr-recruitment-samples/schedule-interview.json |
| interview_feedback | docs/hr-recruitment-samples/interview-feedback.json |
| final_selection | docs/hr-recruitment-samples/final-selection.json |
| onboarding | docs/hr-recruitment-samples/onboarding.json |

**SMTP From:** information@variphi.com
**OpenRouter:** openrouter_api_key in body

Manual default sample = create_job (tests Create Job Opening chain).
